title: DOWNTOWN CAMPUS - 211info
text: SPONSORS INC DOWNTOWN CAMPUS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides transitional housing and supportive services for individuals released in Lane County from Oregon State Prison or the local jail who are currently on correctional supervision. The average length of the program is 90 to 120 days. Services include case management, behavioral health support, drug and alcohol treatment, and assistance with clothing, identification, bus passes or bicycles, employment search, and finding long-term housing. 338 Highway 99 N Eugene, OR 97402 Eligibility: Individuals who identify as female, released from Oregon State Prison or Lane County Jail, and under supervision in Lane County. Participants must follow program rules, remain clean and sober (verified by urinalysis and breathalyzer testing), obtain full-time employment or enroll in school full-time, and comply with all conditions of their supervision. Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (541) 485-8341 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 485-8341 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call, email, or visit website for more information or to fill out an online application FEES: Housing: First 30 days free, $1.50 per day for next 30-day period, $6 per day for following 30-day period Food: $7 per day (can be paid with SNAP benefits) DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish by arrangement AREA SERVED: Lane County Services: Ex-Offender Halfway Houses * Women Ex-Offender Reentry Programs * Women Other Services Offered At This Location: CRIMINAL CORRECTIONAL SYSTEM - ROOSEVELT CROSSING EMPLOYMENT - ROSS SHEPARD REENTRY RESOURCE CENTER If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. SPONSORS INC
